starter.audience: Try verification locally before committing to CI.
starter.valueUnlock: Sign in for Account. Use the open-source repo build for contract verification without a subscription; paid CLI and keys start on Individual.

individual.audience: Run verification in CI for personal or early-stage projects.
individual.valueUnlock: Published npm CLI, API keys, monthly quota, and CI enforcement on one subscription.

team.audience: Ship safely: enforce database correctness in CI across your team.
team.valueUnlock: Higher monthly quota for shared CI, multiple repos, or more services—same enforcement as Individual.

business.audience: Scale verification across multiple services with predictable cost.
business.valueUnlock: 50k verifications per month and headroom for busy pipelines; same CLI and enforcement model.

enterprise.audience: Procurement and invoicing, custom limits or SLAs, and on-prem or tightly controlled environments.
enterprise.valueUnlock: Sales-led onboarding, tailored limits, and contract terms outside self-serve checkout.
